name: wingbits
description: Wingbits monorepo — SDK and CLI for the Wingbits Customer API

scripts.build: bun run --filter wingbits-sdk build && bun run --filter wingbits-cli build
scripts.test: bun run --filter wingbits-sdk test && bun run --filter wingbits-cli test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --filter wingbits-sdk test:coverage && bun run --filter wingbits-cli test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter wingbits-sdk typecheck && bun run --filter wingbits-cli typecheck
